The '''Exex''' was the ruling class on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin's]] [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]. It was comprised mostly of business leaders who maintained their headquarters on Cloud City. They were offset by the [[Baron Administrator/Legends|Baron Administrator]] and the [[Parliament of Guilds]].

==Appearances==
*[[Crisis on Cloud City (adventure book)|''Crisis on Cloud City'']]
*''[[The Jewel of Yavin]]'' {{Mo}}
*{{JournalCite|14|Galaxywide NewsNets}}
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Trouble on Cloud City]]''
